JOSUE R. APARICIO, Esq., of HANSON BRIDGETT LLP, (415) 777-3200, for Defendant.

Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAVID G. SPIVAK, Esq. of the Spivak Law Firm (Tel: 213-725-9094) for plaintiff;
Atty. DOROTHY S. LIU, Esq. of Hanson Bridgett LLP (Tel: 415-777-3200) for defendant Caritas Management Corporation.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CRISTINA JAOCHICO's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Matter discussed.

No opposition to final approval stated.

The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion for final approval of class action is granted.

The Court sets a Final Accounting Hearing for December 12, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. An accounting report is due by December 5, 2023.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-19-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
DAVID G. SPIVAK, esq., THE SPIVAK LAW FIRM, (213) 725-9094, david@spivaklaw.com for Plaintiff CRISTINA JAOCHICO, and all others similarly situated
DOROTHY S. LIU, ESQ., HANSON BRIDGETT LLP, (415) 777-3200, DLiu@hansonbridgett.com, for Defendant.

Court discloses that she knows defense counsel's husband, but that this will not affect her ruling in this matter. No objection is made.

Hearing is held. The issues stated in the Court's tentative ruling are discussed.

PLAINTIFF CRISTINA JAOCHICO, CRISTINA JAOCHIC Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is GRANTED. Court will determine the next hearing date for Final Fairness Hearing. In addition, the court will execute the parties proposed stipulation and order allowing for the filing of the second amended complaint.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC3.1312.

Judge: Vedica Puri: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/VP)
